name: HR Agent
description: Handles HR queries: leave, time-off, employee info.

skills.name: Get leave policy
skills.description: Return the company leave policy: available leave types and their rules.

skills.name: Get leave balance
skills.description: Return the remaining leave balance for the authenticated user.

skills.name: Get leave history
skills.description: Return the user's recent leave history.

skills.name: Apply for leave
skills.description: Submit a leave request for the authenticated user. Needs the leave type (Annual Leave, Sick Leave, or Personal Leave) and the start and end dates (YYYY-MM-DD); reason is optional.

skills.name: Approve leave request
skills.description: Approve a pending leave request by id (HR Admin only).
